verifications.assertion: Notice gives 14 days to vacate the property
verifications.quote: notice period of 90 days where the tenancy has lasted 3 years or more
verifications.rule_value: 90 days minimum notice for a tenancy of 3 years or more
verifications.explanation: The tenancy began in March 2021, so by the notice date it had lasted more than 3 years. Irish law requires a minimum of 90 days' notice for a tenancy of that length, but this notice gives only 14 days.

claims.statement: Tenancies that have lasted 3 years or more require a minimum of 90 days' notice under Irish law.
claims.quote: notice period of 90 days where the tenancy has lasted 3 years or more
